title: MORE THAN 100 PUBLIC SCHOOLS BENEFITED BY ZAMBOS
summary: Our social responsibility program continues to grow, reaching over 100 public schools with educational supplies and nutrition programs.
content_intro: As part of our commitment to education, we have managed to benefit more than 100 public schools throughout the country.
quote: Investing in education is investing in the future. Every child who learns is a seed of hope.
content_after_quote: Our team has worked tirelessly with local communities to identify the most urgent needs and provide effective solutions.
